summary: Completed comprehensive testing of INWO Quiz Game. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend mostly functional with one critical clipboard permission issue blocking Play Again functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: Clipboard API permission denied error when copying prize code
ui_bugs.error_details: Failed to execute 'writeText' on 'Clipboard': Write permission denied

ui_bugs.issue: Webpack dev server overlay intercepts pointer events, preventing Play Again button clicks
ui_bugs.error_details: iframe src='about:blank' id='webpack-dev-server-client-overlay' intercepts pointer events

passed_tests: Get all INWO cards (15 cards returned)
Landing page loads with all sections (hero, features, stats, CTA)
Prize system (user won FRETE GRATIS prize)
Quiz results display with score and prize
Frontend-backend integration for registration and gameplay
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix clipboard API permission issue and webpack dev server overlay blocking interactions. Consider implementing fallback for clipboard functionality and resolve React hook dependency warning.
